voiceLines.speaker: Arthur Bell
voiceLines.text: {track} looks magnificent today: fast entries, dangerous exits, and very honest kerbs.

voiceLines.speaker: Mags Whitlow
voiceLines.text: Five red lights, then it is noise, nerves, and no excuses.

voiceLines.speaker: Radio
voiceLines.text: Damage is climbing. Stay off the outside kerbs and bring it home.

voiceLines.speaker: Radio
voiceLines.text: Contact confirmed. Check the front wing and give them space.

voiceLines.speaker: Radio
voiceLines.text: Tyres are fading. Brake earlier and keep the steering smooth.

songs.prompt: Instrumental pop rock racing game menu loop, bright electric guitar hooks, tight drums, pulsing synth bass, celebratory but focused, no vocals.
Instrumental pre-race build, British motorsport tension, muted guitars, tom drums, rising synth pulses, dramatic but not dark, no vocals.
Instrumental podium celebration, pop rock chorus feel, claps, clean guitars, triumphant synth lead, compact loop, no vocals.
Instrumental championship finale music, energetic pop rock parade, big drums, bright guitars, victory synths, celebratory, no vocals.
